description: A minimalist, cartoonish bed with a simple yellow frame and a white headboard. The bed is made with a white sheet, a red pillow, and a bright teal comforter that has a gradient effect, transitioning from a lighter teal at the top to a deeper blue-green at the bottom. Next to the bed is a small, white nightstand with two drawers, also in a simplified, cartoon style. On top of the nightstand rests a small, red and white alarm clock with black hands and a stylized face. The overall aesthetic is clean, modern, and playful, with a focus on bold colors and simple geometric shapes.
